title: Hawa
desc: Two unemployed friends are forced to move to the cheaper countryside. However, paranormal misadventures ensue at their new house.

title: Mr. & Mrs. 420 Returns
desc: Two young men part ways with their families in pursuit of success. However, they must lie about their marital status in order to secure a residence.

title: Carry on Jatta
desc: Jass falls in love with Mahie and wants to marry her but there is a problem. Mahie only wants to marry an orphan, so Jass lies to her and gets trapped into the web of his own lies.

title: Lekh
desc: Destiny intervenes to bring two estranged individuals back together, allowing them to confront and overcome the misconceptions that separated them as teenagers.

title: Qismat
desc: Shiva is not serious about love until he falls for a pretty girl in the neighbourhood. However, fate deals him a cruel blow and steals his chance of a happily-ever-after.

title: Chhalla Mudke Nahi Aaya
desc: A Punjabi man takes a grueling job at a Canadian lumber mill in the early 1900s. However, his struggle for survival is complicated by perilous working conditions.

title: Blackia
desc: A young man enters his father's criminal world of gold smuggling, against his wishes. However, things begin to change when he becomes the kingpin.

title: Yaar Belly
desc: A young man and a woman belonging to different socio-economic backgrounds fall in love. However, they face numerous obstacles from their families.

title: Raduaa Returns
desc: A group of friends embark on a mission using a time machine and travel from 1955 to 2255 and return to 1000 years back in time.

title: Speaker Kharke
desc: A comprehensive compilation presents some of the best and most popular songs from movies in the Punjabi film industry played back to back.

title: Speaker Kharke
desc: A comprehensive compilation presents some of the best and most popular songs from movies in the Punjabi film industry played back to back.

title: Rabba Rabba Meeh Varsa
desc: Amidst a drought, a village prays for rain while one child hopes for dryness. As tensions rise, whose wishes will the heavens grant?

title: Yaar Mera Titliaan Warga
desc: A married couple tries to spice up their marriage by talking to other people. However, as fate would have it, they end up talking to each other through their fake social media accounts.

title: Bajre Da Sitta
desc: Two women who possess a melodious voice are scouted by an agent. But, burdened by the rules and prejudice of society, they are forced to remain untrue to their aspirations.

title: Bina Band Chal England
desc: A man lies to his father-in-law about what he does professionally. However, when the lie gets out of hand, things take a chaotic twist.

title: Hoshiar Singh
desc: Determined to teach despite being labeled 'unfit' for education, Hoshiar Singh surmounts obstacles to pursue teaching, innovating a novel approach to education and existence.

title: Nikka Zaildar
desc: Nikka, a young man studying in a college in Patiala, falls in love with a fellow student and decides to pursue her. However, his journey turns out to be more difficult than expected.
